name: testVisibilityHeaderAndAcquirersList
description: The visibility of the 'Acquirers List' header, which contains a list of Acquirers.
descriptionHtml: The visibility of the 'Acquirers List' header, which contains a list of Acquirers.

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: The visibility of the 'Acquirers List' header, which contains a list of Acquirers.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: Table column header is visible
Verify: Acquirers list is visible and contains elements
